description: Edge-case corpus exercising safeCanonicalize() (NFC + RFC 8785 + 100KB cap) across Unicode normalization, deep nesting, IEEE-754 numeric edges, null vs absent permutations, key ordering, and string-escape minimization. Pairs marked hash_equal_with MUST produce byte-identical canonical output and SHA-256 hashes — that is the determinism contract this corpus locks in.

fixtures.description: Forward-alphabetical input order. Hash MUST match reverse-alpha.
Reverse-alphabetical input order — canonical form sorts alphabetically.
Unicode key sorting — RFC 8785 sorts by Unicode code point order (ä = U+00E4 sorts after z = U+007A).
10-level "nested" chain ending in a string leaf.
25-level "nested" chain ending in a numeric leaf.
12-level chain ending in a mixed-type array.
Object without b — canonicalizes to {"a":1}. Hash differs from null-present.
All-null object — every key serialized.
Array literal with null element — preserved.
Empty object vs null — semantically distinct, hashes differ.
Null inside a nested object.
Object with explicit null b — canonicalizes to {"a":1,"b":null}.
Negative integer — must serialize without trailing decimal.
Integer 100 — must serialize without trailing decimal.
Integer zero — must serialize as "0", not "0.0" or "-0".
Large magnitude — RFC 8785 emits scientific notation when |x| >= 1e21.
Floating-point sum 0.1 + 0.2 — verifies short IEEE-754 representation (0.30000000000000004).
Small magnitude — RFC 8785 emits scientific notation when |x| < 1e-6.
Newline (U+000A) — escaped as \n.
Tab character (U+0009) — escaped as \t.
Forward slash — RFC 8785 does NOT escape /; output stays literal.
Internal backslash — escaped as \\.
Internal double-quote — escaped as \".
Non-BMP emoji 😀 (U+1F600) — emitted as a surrogate pair, no \u escape (unless control).
café in NFC (precomposed é, U+00E9).
한국 in NFC (precomposed Hangul syllables).
tiếng in NFC (single ế codepoint).
café in NFD (e + combining acute U+0301). Hash MUST match nfc-cafe.
한국 in NFD (jamo decomposition). Hash MUST match nfc-korean.
tiếng in NFD (e + combining circumflex + combining acute). Hash MUST match nfc-vietnamese.
